title: selliguea costulata
intro: Selliguea costulata, also known as the Sensitive Fern or Raulin's Fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of tropical fern native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. Traditionally, Selliguea costulata has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selliguea costulata include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, and it is often prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes.
